case_title: EDITH JOESPHINE RUIZ VS. FRANCISCO JAVIER RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS: FRANCISCO JAVIER RODRIGUEZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF EDITH JOSEPHINE RUIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO JAIVER RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES TO THE COURT THAT THE PREVIOUSLY SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING HAS BROKEN DOWN AND HAS STOPPED RECIEVING PAYMENTS. DEFENDANT STATES THAT HE HAS MADE PAYMENTS OF $1,800.00 AND PLAINTIFF AGREES TO AMOUNT PAID. COURT DETERMINES THAT JUDMGENT IS TO BE ISSUED. THE AMOUNT PAID OF $1,800 IS CREDITED FOR THE $10,0000 FOR JUDGMENT OF $8,200 PLUS COST. NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-05-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO IF NO APPEARNACE THIS MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED FOR 5 MONTHS FOR A OCT 2021 RESOLVE DATE, TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES MUCH APPEAR IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RUIZ, EDITH JOESPHINE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO JAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-11-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING CONTINUE FOR 6 MONTHS WITH AN END DATE OF OCT-2021. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
(SC-223) DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, EDITH JOESPHINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-30-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK, 506)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, EDITH JOESPHINE
THE COURT ORDERS: DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS IS DENIED. COURT SETS HEARING FOR DEC 30, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. D.506.
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED - FEE FOR SERVICE $350.00 -

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-11-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDITH JOSEPHINE RUIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO JAVIER RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO JAVIER RODRIGUEZ IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF EDITH JOSEPHINE RUIZ THE SUM OF $400.00 PER MONTH STARTING SEPTEMBER 15, 2019 AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH THERAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL ENDING OCTOBER, 2021 FOR A TOTAL PAYMENT OF $10,000. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. A PROGRESS REPORT IS SET FOR FEB-11, 2020. IF NO APPEARANCE, THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER PROGRESS REPORT IN 6 MONTHS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-11-2020. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 08/31/2020. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-29-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
DECLARATION RE: PLANTIFF'S LAST NAME BEING CHANGED FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, EDITH JOESPHINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $375.00 - SERVED JUN-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO JAVIER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, EDITH JOESPHINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, FRANCISCO JAVIER $8,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
